category.scope_note: Air-source heat pump compliance comparison for UAE and China market entry, covering ECAS, energy efficiency, safety and refrigerant obligations.

target_market_label.zh: 阿联酋（ESMA / 迪拜水电局 / TRA）
target_market_label.zht: 阿聯酋（ESMA / 迪拜水電局 / TRA）

title.en: China-to-UAE Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入阿联酋：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入阿聯酋：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against UAE requirements for ECAS and GSO-based product conformity, mandatory energy label and MEPS under ESMA, IEC/EN aligned safety under GSO, TRA radio and EMC pathway, and refrigerant restrictions under ODS / HFC policy context.
description.zh: 公益性对照中国空气源热泵文件与阿联酋ESMA强制ECAS与GSO类对接要求、能效标识与MEPS、基于IEC EN体系的GSO安全规则、TRA无线和电磁兼容路径，以及ODS/HFC背景下制冷剂管制的差异。
description.zht: 公益性對照中國空氣源熱泵文件與阿聯酋ESMA強制ECAS與GSO類對接要求、能效標識與MEPS、基於IEC EN體系的GSO安全規則、TRA無線和電磁相容路徑，以及ODS／HFC背景下製冷劑管制的差異。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, customs ruling, installation approval, technical file acceptance, or legal opinion. Exporters, importers, installers, and customs brokers should verify current ESMA ECAS scope, Emirati utility by-emirate requirements, TRA type-approval practice, refrigerant obligations, and product labels with qualified advisors before shipment, customs clearance, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、海关裁定、安装许可、技术文件受理决定或法律意见。出口商、进口商、安装方与清关代理应在发运、通关或安装前，向合格专业人士核验当前ESMA ECAS适用范围、各酋长国公用事业局要求、TRA型式核准实践、制冷剂义务及标签要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、海關裁定、安裝許可、技術文件受理決定或法律意見。出口商、進口商、安裝方與清關代理應在發運、通關或安裝前，向合格專業人士核驗當前ESMA ECAS適用範圍、各酋長國公用事業局要求、TRA型式核准實踐、製冷劑義務及標籤要求。

answer_first.en: For UAE, ESMA ECAS conformity marking is the central customs and market entry requirement; mandatory energy label and MEPS apply to air conditioners and heat-pump modes; TRA applies to telecom functions; and GSO IEC 60335-2-40 and related safety frameworks are the main technical baseline. R22 is restricted, 50 Hz has direct compatibility with China, and 230 V single-phase is close to Chinese 220 V within tolerance, while ECAS and GSO requirements remain non-equivalent to CCC.
answer_first.zh: 在阿联酋，ESMA的ECAS合格评估与标识是进入市场和通关的核心要求；空调及具备热泵模式的产品需满足能效标识与MEPS；涉及无线/EMC功能要遵循TRA；技术基线以GSO IEC 60335-2-40为核心。R22受限、50Hz与中国无频率差异，230V单相与中国220V在允许范围内，但ECAS与GSO要求与CCC不具备替代关系。
answer_first.zht: 在阿聯酋，ESMA的ECAS合格評估與標誌是進入市場和通關的核心要求；空調及具備熱泵模式的產品需符合能效標識與MEPS；涉及無線/電磁兼容功能要遵循TRA；技術基線以GSO IEC 60335-2-40為核心。R22受限、50Hz與中國無頻率差異，230V單相與中國220V在允許範圍內，但ECAS與GSO要求與CCC不具替代關係。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Update source URLs, market notes, and standards mapping when agencies update requirements or when equivalent-market evidence changes.
